title: SmartSaddle
description: SmartSaddle allows you to easily transport mount entities (horses, donkeys, mules and camels).
body:
## **SmartSaddle​**
### General introduction​ SmartSaddle allows you to easily transport mount entities (horses, donkeys, mules, camels, llamas, nautilus). While riding it, when removing the saddle from the mounts inventory, the saddle/carpet will save the mounts data. Then you can place the saddle again on any other world and the mount will be spawned again. NBTAPI is required for this plugin to run! Get it >> [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nbtapi) << You can also exclude worlds where the mounts can spawned or saved by configuring these in the config.yml
### Permissions:​ Also with some permissions you can allow certain players to save only certain mount types: - smartsaddle.command: Permission for /smartsaddle (reloads config) - smartsaddle.use.*: Permission for saving ALL types of mounts. When replacing the * with the mount type, you can allow only certain types: - smartsaddle.use.horse - smartsaddle.use.donkey - smartsaddle.use.mule - smartsaddle.use.camel - smartsaddle.use.camel_husk - smartsaddle.use.skeleton_horse - smartsaddle.use.zombie_horse - smartsaddle.use.llama - smartsaddle.use.trader_llama - smartsaddle.use.nautilus - smartsaddle.use.zombie_nautilus - smartsaddle.use.happy_ghast
### Information: If you've found a bug or have any kind of request:
Please use the [GitHub Issue Tracker](https://github.com/CuzIm1Tigaaa/SmartSaddle/issues)! Hope you enjoy this Resource! :)
